programs.title: Life After People
programs.desc: Without humans, water becomes a destroyer that brings chaos, flooding cities, collapsing dams and awakening ancient forces that were previously contained.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: Mike and Frank visit a gorgeous Kentucky property with a racetrack. Later, a freestyle stop in North Carolina looks like a bust until they unearth a one-of-a-kind TV relic.

programs.title: Shipping Wars
programs.desc: Jessica signs up to move a half-ton steampunk robot in a single day. Meanwhile, Todd and Tamera realise that moonshine stills and porcelain plates don't mix well.

actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programs.title: Kings of Restoration
programs.desc: A group of experts tries to restore American vintage items to their original state while facing a number of challenges during the job.

programs.title: Counting Cars
programs.desc: Ryan works on a secret project for Bones Legacy. Meanwhile, a Chevy Impala redefines the term low-rider, stunning Mike and Roli. Later, Danny checks out a Satellite Sebring but cannot crack a deal.
